name: Rebilly
description: Payment orchestration and subscription billing platform with global payments, KYC, and compliance.

seo.title: Rebilly — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Rebilly: Payment orchestration and subscription billing platform with global payments, KYC, and compliance.

when_to_use: Subscription billing with KYC and global payments in one platform
Recurring billing with intelligent PSP routing and retry
Compliance-integrated payment orchestration for regulated industries

pros: Combines orchestration with full subscription billing
Built-in KYC, risk, and compliance tooling
Handles complex dunning and retry logic
Good fit for high-volume recurring merchants
cons: Broad product footprint can feel heavy
Steep learning curve vs. single-purpose tools
Pricing scales with GMV and features
review.verdict: Worthwhile for subscription merchants who want billing, routing, and risk in one platform; heavier than a pure orchestrator.
review.best_for: Recurring-revenue businesses that want billing, orchestration, dunning, and risk from one vendor.
review.not_for: One-time commerce merchants who just need routing across a few PSPs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
